name: CardioCore
description: Agentic cardiac assessment MCP suite. Analyzes 12-lead ECGs, estimates ejection fraction from echo video, performs structural cardiac analysis, computes HEART risk scores, and outputs validated FHIR R4 DiagnosticReports. Powered by Gemma 4 on AMD MI300X.
author: Binula

tools.name: analyze_ecg_leads
tools.description: Classify 12-lead ECG rhythm from image (PNG/JPEG) or CSV signal. Returns rhythm class, SNOMED code, confidence, clinical flags, and FHIR Observation.

tools.name: estimate_ejection_fraction
tools.description: Estimate left ventricular ejection fraction from echocardiogram video. Returns EF%, HF classification, SNOMED code, and FHIR Observation.

tools.name: analyze_cardiac_structure
tools.description: Analyze cardiac structural features from echo video. Returns LV size, wall thickness, chamber flags.

tools.name: risk_stratify
tools.description: Compute HEART score and triage tier. Accepts ECG result, Echo result, and clinical context. Returns score 0-10, Urgent/Routine/Normal tier.

tools.name: generate_cardiac_report
tools.description: Generate validated FHIR R4 DiagnosticReport bundle from all analysis results. Final output of the CardioCore pipeline.
